purpose: Thin Codex bootstrap. All agent operating instructions are in AGENTS.md at the repository root.

notes: Read AGENTS.md first — it contains all operating instructions.
Use focused_context_files for GHT-specific context after AGENTS.md.
Do not load broad docs unless a task needs them.
Do not expand into unrelated experiments by default.
Check docs/transactions.md before making structured repository changes.

mission: Prove that a small, agent-friendly yard scenario can reveal hidden infrastructure, record meaningful evidence, and support a real drainage/repair round without losing the larger world-first identity.
